successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, and LeaveQueryParams interfaces with exact field names from canonical architecture
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with all CRUD methods using proper TypeScript signatures
All interfaces import LeaveType and LeaveStatus from src/shared/types/index.ts

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Leave service interface and core implementation (Phase 2)
Integration with other modules beyond type imports
